scripts.test:local: pnpm test:local:sql && pnpm test:local:d1 && pnpm test:local:kv && pnpm test:local:edgedb && pnpm test:local:neo4j && pnpm test:local:surrealdb && pnpm test:local:drizzle && pnpm test:local:kysely && pnpm test:local:sequelize && pnpm test:local:typeorm && pnpm test:local:mikroorm && pnpm test:local:dynamodb && pnpm test:local:redis && pnpm test:local:supabase && pnpm test:local:xata && pnpm test:local:unstorage && pnpm test:local:mongodb && pnpm test:local:prisma
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck
scripts.release:latest: pnpm exec bumpp --configFilePath bump.config.ts --release patch --yes && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.release:beta: pnpm exec bumpp --configFilePath bump.config.ts --release prerelease --preid beta --yes && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:latest: pnpm --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:latest:dry-run: pnpm --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --no-git-checks --dry-run
scripts.publish:beta: pnpm --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:beta:dry-run: pnpm --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks --dry-run
